OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

RECORDED_FUTURE_ASI_API_V1_BASE_URL.description: v1 API base URL for exposure history activity.

RECORDED_FUTURE_ASI_PROJECT_ID.description: ASI project ID to fetch exposures from.

RECORDED_FUTURE_ASI_TLP_LEVEL.description: Default TLP level of the imported entities.

RECORDED_FUTURE_ASI_PORTAL_BASE_URL.description: Optional portal base URL for external reference deep links.

RECORDED_FUTURE_ASI_PAGE_LIMIT.description: Number of exposures to fetch per API page.

RECORDED_FUTURE_ASI_RUN_LIMIT.description: Max exposures to import per connector run. None = no limit (current behavior).

RECORDED_FUTURE_ASI_RETRY_MAX_ATTEMPTS.description: Maximum HTTP request attempts (including the first) before giving up.

RECORDED_FUTURE_ASI_RETRY_INITIAL_SECOND.description: Initial backoff delay in seconds for retried requests.

RECORDED_FUTURE_ASI_RETRY_MAX_SECONDS.description: Maximum backoff delay in seconds between retry attempts.

RECORDED_FUTURE_ASI_FILTER_SEVERITY_MIN.description: Only import exposures at or above this severity.

RECORDED_FUTURE_ASI_FILTER_SEVERITY_EXAC.description: Only import exposures matching this severity exactly.
